---
title: "Open Source Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects | Anthony Faustine"
description-meta: "Open-source ML libraries for forecasting, load monitoring, and production machine learning systems."

format:
  html:
    body-class: "projects"
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="projects.css">

toc: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(yaml)
projects_data <- yaml::read_yaml("data.yml")
```

::: {.projects-header}
# Open Source Projects

Production-grade ML libraries built for real problems. From research to enterprise.

:::

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat('<div class="projects-grid">\n')

for (proj in projects_data$projects) {
  status <- proj$status
  color <- projects_data$status_colors[[status]]

  cat(sprintf('<div class="project-card" style="border-top-color: %s;">\n', color))
  cat('<div class="card-header">\n')
  cat(sprintf('<h3 class="project-name">%s</h3>\n', proj$name))
  cat(sprintf('<span class="status-badge" style="background-color: %s;">%s</span>\n', color, status))
  cat('</div>\n')

  cat('<div class="card-body">\n')
  cat(sprintf('<p class="project-description">%s</p>\n', proj$description))
  cat(sprintf('<div class="project-highlight">%s</div>\n', proj$highlight))

  cat('<div class="card-links">\n')
  for (link in proj$links) {
    cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="link-badge" title="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-%s"></i> %s</a>\n',
                link$url, link$label, link$icon, link$label))
  }
  cat('</div>\n')
  cat('</div>\n')

  cat('<div class="card-footer">\n')
  cat(sprintf('<span class="meta-item"><i class="bi bi-calendar"></i> Updated %s</span>\n', proj$updated))
  if (!is.null(proj$paper)) {
    cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="meta-item" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i> Paper</a>\n',
                proj$paper$url))
  }
  cat('</div>\n')

  cat('</div>\n')
}

cat('</div>\n')
```

---

## Contribute

These projects welcome contributions, feedback, and collaboration.

[Open an Issue](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} [Submit a PR](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
